items.title_zh: 破万亿！智谱市值≈2个小米、4个百度，凭什么？
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Market Cap Breaks Trillion, Equals 2 Xiaomis or 4 Baidus
items.summary_zh: 破万亿！智谱市值≈2个小米、4个百度，凭什么？ 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's market cap has surpassed one trillion RMB, equivalent to two Xiaomis or four Baidus. This milestone highlights the company's strong technology and market recognition in China's AI sector.
items.why_zh: 智谱AI市值破万亿，反映了中国AI大模型企业的巨大潜力和市场信心。
items.why_en: Zhipu AI's trillion-yuan market cap underscores the immense potential and investor confidence in China's AI large model companies.

items.title_zh: OpenAI GPT-5.5网络AI击败Anthropic被禁的Mythos模型，且无人叫停
items.title_en: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Cyber AI Beats Anthropic's Banned Mythos Model—And Nobody's Shutting It Down
items.summary_zh: OpenAI的GPT-5.5网络AI在性能上击败了Anthropic被禁的Mythos模型，且没有受到任何监管或叫停。这一事件凸显了AI领域竞争的激烈程度，以及监管滞后于技术发展的现状。GPT-5.5在网络安全等任务上表现出色，而Mythos模型因潜在风险被Anthropic自行禁止。OpenAI的模型未被叫停，引发了关于AI安全与监管的讨论。
items.summary_en: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Cyber AI Beats Anthropic's Banned Mythos Model—And Nobody's Shutting It Down Decrypt
items.why_zh: 该事件揭示了AI军备竞赛中安全与监管的缺失，可能引发更广泛的伦理讨论。
items.why_en: This event reveals the lack of safety and regulation in the AI arms race, potentially sparking broader ethical debates.

items.title_zh: OpenAI启动“修补星球”计划，为开源项目提供AI驱动的网络安全支持
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches Patch the Planet Initiative to Deploy AI-powered Cybersecurity Support Across Open Source Projects
items.summary_zh: OpenAI宣布启动“修补星球”计划，旨在利用AI技术为开源项目提供网络安全支持。该计划将部署AI驱动的工具，帮助开源社区识别和修复安全漏洞。此举有望提升开源软件的整体安全性，并展示AI在网络安全领域的应用潜力。OpenAI希望通过这一计划回馈开源社区，同时推动AI技术的积极应用。
items.summary_en: OpenAI Launches Patch the Planet Initiative to Deploy AI-powered Cybersecurity Support Across Open Source Projects AI Insider
items.why_zh: 该计划展示了AI在网络安全领域的实际应用，并有助于提升开源生态的安全性。
items.why_en: This initiative demonstrates AI's practical application in cybersecurity and helps improve the security of the open source ecosystem.

items.title_zh: Anthropic在Slack中推出Claude Tag，计划更广泛推广
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag in Slack with plans for wider rollout
items.summary_zh: Anthropic在Slack中推出了Claude Tag功能，允许用户在聊天中通过@Claude调用AI助手。该功能旨在为团队提供一个持久的AI队友，协助完成各种任务。Anthropic计划在未来更广泛地推广这一功能，使其覆盖更多平台和用户。Claude Tag的推出标志着AI协作工具在企业级应用中的进一步深化。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag in Slack with plans for wider rollout TradingView
items.why_zh: Claude Tag将AI助手深度集成到团队协作工具中，提升了工作效率和AI的实用性。
items.why_en: Claude Tag deeply integrates AI into team collaboration tools, boosting productivity and AI's practicality.

items.title_zh: 字节跳动发布豆包大模型2.1，API 服务已上线火山
items.title_en: ByteDance Releases Doubao Model 2.1, API Now Live on Volcano Engine
items.summary_zh: 字节跳动发布豆包大模型2.1，API 服务已上线火山 集微网
items.summary_en: ByteDance has released version 2.1 of its Doubao large language model, with API services now available on the Volcano Engine platform. The update brings performance improvements, aiming to provide developers and enterprises with enhanced AI capabilities.
items.why_zh: 字节跳动持续迭代豆包大模型，显示其在AI领域的竞争决心，对国内AI生态有重要影响。
items.why_en: ByteDance's continuous iteration of the Doubao model underscores its commitment to AI competition, significantly impacting the domestic AI ecosystem.

items.title_zh: Anthropic在Slack中推出Claude Tag，助力团队协作
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag for Slack team collaboration
items.summary_zh: Anthropic在Slack中推出了Claude Tag功能，旨在提升团队协作效率。该功能允许用户在Slack消息中通过@Claude直接调用AI助手，获取信息或完成任务。此举将AI能力无缝融入日常工作流程，有望提高生产力。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag for Slack team collaboration Investing.com
items.why_zh: Claude Tag将AI集成到常用协作工具中，降低了AI使用门槛，可能改变企业团队的工作方式。
items.why_en: Claude Tag integrates AI into a widely-used collaboration tool, lowering the barrier to AI adoption and potentially transforming how teams work.

items.title_zh: Anthropic在Slack推出Claude Tag，瞄准企业AI市场
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag in Slack, targets enterprise AI market
items.summary_zh: Anthropic在Slack中推出了Claude Tag功能，直接面向企业AI市场。该功能允许团队成员在Slack中通过标签调用Claude AI，实现快速信息检索和任务自动化。这标志着Anthropic在企业级AI应用上的重要布局。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag in Slack, targets enterprise AI market mezha.net
items.why_zh: 此举表明Anthropic正积极拓展企业市场，与Slack的集成可能加速AI在企业中的普及。
items.why_en: This move signals Anthropic's aggressive push into the enterprise market, and integration with Slack could accelerate AI adoption in businesses.

items.title_zh: Anthropic在Slack中推出Claude Tag AI代理，面向团队
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag AI agent in Slack for teams
items.summary_zh: Anthropic在Slack中推出了Claude Tag AI代理功能，专为团队协作设计。用户可以通过@Claude在对话中直接与AI交互，获取答案或执行任务。该功能旨在简化工作流程，提升团队效率。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag AI agent in Slack for teams qz.com
items.why_zh: AI代理直接嵌入团队沟通平台，使AI协作更加自然便捷，可能成为未来工作模式的重要趋势。
items.why_en: Embedding AI agents directly into team communication platforms makes AI collaboration more natural and convenient, potentially shaping future work patterns.

items.title_zh: Anthropic投资者Menlo迎来50周年并筹集30亿美元
items.title_en: Anthropic Investor Menlo Turns 50 and Raises $3 Billion
items.summary_zh: Anthropic的重要投资者Menlo Ventures迎来成立50周年，并成功筹集了30亿美元的新基金。Menlo是Anthropic的主要支持者之一，此次募资显示了其对AI领域的持续信心。这笔资金将用于进一步投资前沿科技公司。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Investor Menlo Turns 50 and Raises $3 Billion PYMNTS.com
items.why_zh: Menlo的大规模募资表明资本对AI领域的长期看好，Anthropic作为其投资组合公司将受益于这一资源。
items.why_en: Menlo's massive fundraise signals strong long-term capital interest in AI, benefiting Anthropic as a portfolio company.

items.title_zh: Anthropic在Slack推出Claude Tag，为团队提供持久AI队友
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag in Slack, gives teams a persistent AI teammate
items.summary_zh: Anthropic在Slack中推出了Claude Tag功能，用户可以通过@Claude随时召唤AI助手。该功能使Claude成为团队中的持久AI队友，能够协助处理信息查询、任务管理等事务。Anthropic计划逐步扩大该功能的覆盖范围。这一举措进一步推动了AI在办公协作场景中的普及。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag in Slack, gives teams a persistent AI teammate mezha.net
items.why_zh: 该功能将AI无缝融入日常工作流程，展示了AI作为协作伙伴的潜力。
items.why_en: This feature seamlessly integrates AI into daily workflows, showcasing its potential as a collaborative partner.

items.title_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Tag企业协作工具，支持智能工作流
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag enterprise collaborative tool for agentic workflows
items.summary_zh: Anthropic推出了Claude Tag企业协作工具，专为智能工作流设计。该工具集成在Slack中，允许团队通过标签调用AI代理，实现任务自动化和信息检索。这有助于企业提升运营效率，推动AI驱动的业务流程。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag enterprise collaborative tool for agentic workflows 9to5Mac
items.why_zh: Claude Tag针对企业智能工作流，可能成为企业数字化转型的关键工具，提升AI在业务中的实用性。
items.why_en: Claude Tag targets enterprise agentic workflows, potentially becoming a key tool for digital transformation and enhancing AI's practicality in business.

items.title_zh: Anthropic面向Slack用户推出Claude Tag研究预览版
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag in research preview for Slack users
items.summary_zh: Anthropic面向Slack用户推出了Claude Tag的研究预览版。该功能允许用户在Slack中通过@Claude与AI交互，目前处于测试阶段。此举旨在收集用户反馈，优化产品性能，为正式发布做准备。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag in research preview for Slack users Reuters
items.why_zh: 研究预览版表明Anthropic在谨慎推进产品迭代，用户反馈将直接影响最终功能，对AI协作工具的发展有参考价值。
items.why_en: The research preview indicates Anthropic's cautious product iteration; user feedback will directly shape the final feature, offering insights into AI collaboration tool development.

items.title_zh: RightCapital为理财顾问推出AI代理Iris
items.title_en: RightCapital Launches AI Agent Iris for Advisors
items.summary_zh: RightCapital推出了名为Iris的AI代理，专为理财顾问设计。Iris能够协助顾问进行客户分析、投资建议等任务，提升服务效率。此举将AI技术引入金融咨询领域，有望改善顾问的工作流程和客户体验。
items.summary_en: RightCapital Launches AI Agent Iris for Advisors Wealth Management
items.why_zh: Iris将AI应用于金融咨询，展示了AI在专业服务领域的潜力，可能推动理财行业的智能化转型。
items.why_en: Iris applies AI to financial advisory, demonstrating AI's potential in professional services and potentially driving intelligent transformation in the wealth management industry.

items.title_zh: 万亿智谱领衔 国产大模型集体跨坎
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Leads Trillion-Yuan Club, Domestic LLMs Cross Threshold
items.summary_zh: 万亿智谱领衔 国产大模型集体跨坎 新浪网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's market cap surpasses 1 trillion HKD, leading domestic LLMs. ByteDance's AI spending may exceed 200 billion RMB this year, and Doubao LLM's daily token usage hits 180 trillion. China's 4th-gen superconducting quantum computer goes online.
items.why_zh: 国产大模型在市值、支出和应用规模上均创纪录，显示中国AI产业正加速商业化与自主创新。
items.why_en: Record-breaking market cap, spending, and usage of domestic LLMs signal accelerating commercialization and self-reliance in China's AI industry.

items.title_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Tag：Slack中的虚拟员工
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag, a tool that works like a virtual employee within Slack
items.summary_zh: Anthropic发布Claude Tag，这是一款集成在Slack中的AI工具，能像虚拟员工一样工作。它可学习团队沟通模式、监控项目进展并自主执行任务，取代了之前的Slack应用。Claude Tag作为持久化的AI队友，能持续学习和适应，提升团队协作效率。此举标志着AI从被动工具向主动协作者的转变。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag, a tool that works like a virtual employee within Slack Fortune
items.why_zh: Claude Tag将AI从工具升级为主动协作者，可能重塑团队协作方式。
items.why_en: Claude Tag upgrades AI from tool to active collaborator, potentially reshaping team workflows.

items.title_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Tag：Slack中自主学习、监控并自主工作的持久AI队友
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag, replacing its Slack app with a persistent AI teammate that learns, monitors and works autonomously
items.summary_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Tag，取代其原有的Slack应用，成为一款持久化的AI队友。Claude Tag能学习团队沟通模式、持续监控项目进展，并自主执行任务，无需人工频繁指令。它作为虚拟员工融入Slack工作流，提升团队效率。这一创新展示了AI从响应式工具向主动式协作者的演进。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag, replacing its Slack app with a persistent AI teammate that learns, monitors and works autonomously VentureBeat
items.why_zh: Claude Tag代表了AI从被动工具到主动协作者的转变，可能重新定义人机协作模式。
items.why_en: Claude Tag represents a shift from passive tool to active collaborator, potentially redefining human-AI teamwork.

items.title_zh: 【早报】字节被爆今年AI支出将超2000亿；我国第四代自主超导量子计算机上线
items.title_en: ByteDance's AI Spending May Exceed 200B RMB; China's 4th-Gen Superconducting Quantum Computer Goes Online
items.summary_zh: 【早报】字节被爆今年AI支出将超2000亿；我国第四代自主超导量子计算机上线 财联社
items.summary_en: ByteDance's AI spending may exceed 200 billion RMB this year. China's 4th-gen self-developed superconducting quantum computer goes online, boosting AI compute infrastructure.
items.why_zh: 字节的巨额AI支出和量子计算机上线，分别从应用和基础层面展现中国AI产业的加速投入与自主创新。
items.why_en: ByteDance's massive AI spending and the new quantum computer highlight China's accelerating investment and self-reliance in AI.

items.title_zh: 巨亏47亿，市值5000亿:拆解智谱AI的定价逻辑-CSDN博客
items.title_en: Zhipu AI's $6.5B Valuation Amid $4.7B Loss: Pricing Logic Explained
items.summary_zh: 巨亏47亿，市值5000亿:拆解智谱AI的定价逻辑-CSDN博客 新浪网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI, despite a 4.7 billion yuan loss, maintains a 500 billion yuan valuation, sparking analysis of its pricing logic. The article examines factors like technology, market position, and investor expectations, highlighting the market's shift from short-term profits to long-term potential in AI.
items.why_zh: 揭示了AI企业高估值与巨额亏损并存的行业现象，对理解AI投资逻辑至关重要。
items.why_en: Reveals the coexistence of high valuation and massive losses in AI companies, crucial for understanding AI investment logic.

items.title_zh: 智谱万亿背后 马斯克只是引信
items.title_en: Behind Zhipu's Trillion Valuation: Musk Just the Trigger
items.summary_zh: 智谱万亿背后 马斯克只是引信 新浪网
items.summary_en: The article explores the reasons behind Zhipu AI's trillion-HKD valuation, noting that Elon Musk's actions were just a trigger. The real drivers include China's AI industry growth, policy support, and Zhipu's technological breakthroughs, signaling global recognition but also bubble risks.
items.why_zh: 分析中国AI企业高估值的真实驱动因素，对评估行业趋势有参考价值。
items.why_en: Analyzes the real drivers behind high valuations of Chinese AI companies, valuable for assessing industry trends.

items.title_zh: Hallmark医疗解决方案推出AI工具，破解劳动力“黑箱”
items.title_en: Hallmark Health Care Solutions launches AI solution to tackle workforce ‘black box’
items.summary_zh: Hallmark Health Care Solutions发布了一款AI解决方案，旨在解决医疗行业劳动力管理中的“黑箱”问题。该工具通过分析员工排班、绩效等数据，优化人力资源配置，提高运营效率。关键细节包括，该AI系统能够预测人员需求、减少加班成本，并改善员工满意度。这一举措对医疗行业具有重要意义，有望缓解劳动力短缺和成本压力。
items.summary_en: Hallmark Health Care Solutions launches AI solution to tackle workforce ‘black box’ Fierce Healthcare
items.why_zh: 展示了AI在医疗劳动力管理中的实际应用，有助于提升行业效率。
items.why_en: Demonstrates practical AI application in healthcare workforce management, improving efficiency.

items.title_zh: 智谱市值首超1万亿港元 与MiniMax拉开超4倍差距
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Market Cap First Exceeds 1 Trillion HKD, Widening Gap with MiniMax to 4x
items.summary_zh: 智谱市值首超1万亿港元 与MiniMax拉开超4倍差距 搜狐网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's market cap surpasses 1 trillion HKD, widening its lead over MiniMax to over 4 times, solidifying its top position among domestic LLM firms.
items.why_zh: 智谱市值破万亿标志国产大模型商业化取得重大突破，行业龙头地位进一步巩固。
items.why_en: Zhipu's trillion-HKD market cap marks a major commercialization milestone for domestic LLMs, cementing its leadership.

items.title_zh: 豆包视频生成模型Seedance 2.5 预计将于7月上线|火山引擎|具身智能|智能驾驶|仿真|数据_手机新浪网

items.summary_en: Doubao's Seedance 2.5 video generation model, under Volcengine, is expected to launch in July, with improvements in quality, speed, and diversity. It will be applied in embodied AI, autonomous driving, simulation, and data, boosting AI video generation.
items.why_zh: 标志着AI视频生成技术的重大进步，对多个行业应用有深远影响。
items.why_en: Marks a significant advancement in AI video generation, with far-reaching impacts on multiple industries.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出Daybreak，加速AI驱动网络安全
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches Daybreak to Accelerate AI-Driven Cybersecurity
items.summary_zh: OpenAI发布了名为Daybreak的新项目，旨在加速AI在网络安全领域的应用。Daybreak将利用OpenAI的大模型技术，帮助安全团队更快速地检测和响应威胁。关键细节包括，该项目将提供自动化威胁分析、漏洞识别和事件响应等功能。这一举措对网络安全行业具有重要影响，有望提升防御效率并降低人力成本。
items.summary_en: OpenAI Launches Daybreak to Accelerate AI-Driven Cybersecurity Mexico Business News
items.why_zh: 表明OpenAI正将AI能力拓展至网络安全领域，可能重塑行业格局。
items.why_en: Shows OpenAI expanding AI capabilities into cybersecurity, potentially reshaping the industry.

items.title_zh: 「AI新世代」市值站上万亿港元，智谱为何能被单独定价
items.title_en: New AI Era: Zhipu's Trillion-HKD Valuation and Why It Stands Alone
items.summary_zh: 「AI新世代」市值站上万亿港元，智谱为何能被单独定价 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's trillion-HKD valuation highlights its unique position in AI, driven by technological leadership, commercialization, and core role in China's AI ecosystem. Its large models are validated across industries, signaling a shift from concept to profitability.
items.why_zh: 探讨AI企业获得独立高估值的条件，对投资和行业分析有重要参考。
items.why_en: Explores conditions for independent high valuations in AI, valuable for investment and industry analysis.

items.title_zh: Meta推出更便宜的AI智能眼镜，起售价299美元
items.title_en: Meta launches cheaper range of AI smart glasses starting at $299
items.summary_zh: Meta发布了三款价格更低的AI智能眼镜，起售价299美元，包括Adventurer、Fury和与凯莉·詹娜合作的Starfire。这些眼镜内置摄像头、扬声器，支持与Meta AI对话、翻译和拍摄等功能。关键细节在于，新品由Meta设计，依视路陆逊梯卡生产，旨在降低价格门槛以扩大市场。这一举措对智能眼镜行业具有重要影响，可能推动AI可穿戴设备的普及。
items.summary_en: Meta launches cheaper range of AI smart glasses starting at $299 Reuters
items.why_zh: 降低AI智能眼镜价格门槛，有望加速消费级AI可穿戴设备普及。
items.why_en: Lowers the price barrier for AI smart glasses, potentially accelerating consumer adoption of AI wearables.

items.title_zh: Meta 三款自有品牌智能眼镜首发亮相，299-399 美元
items.title_en: Meta Debuts Three Branded Smart Glasses, $299-$399
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，北京时间今晚，Meta 首次以自有品牌推出 价格更低的智能眼镜 ，首批产品包括 Adventurer、Fury，以及与凯莉 · 詹娜合作打造的 Starfire。 Adventurer 和 Fury 售价均为 299 美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 2029 元人民币），比去年发布的第二代雷朋 Meta Wayfarer 便宜 80 美元。Starfire 售价 399 美元（现汇率约合 2708 元人民币），主要面向更年轻、更看重时尚设计的消费者。 三款眼镜由 Meta 设计，雷朋和欧克利母公司依视路陆逊梯卡负责生产，镜腿内侧和包装上都同时印有双方标识。 Meta 和依视路陆逊梯卡高管均认为，改变产品策略是为了提供 更容易接受的价格 。 Adventurer 采用方形镜框，边缘较窄，并提供常规和大号两种尺寸。 Fury 整体轮廓接近 Adventurer，镜框更厚。 凯莉 · 詹娜合作款 Starfire 采用纤细的椭圆形设计，迎合女性消费者中逐渐流行的眼镜风格。 Meta 为新品准备了玳瑁色、黑色和绿色等多种配色，并提供变色、偏光和透明镜片，用户也可以安装处方镜片。其内置摄像头、扬声器，用户可以与 Meta 的 AI 对话，完成翻译或理解眼前事物等操作，并支持拍摄周围环境的照片和视频。 三款眼镜的功能基本延续 Meta 现有无屏眼镜，鼻托宽度可以在…
items.summary_en: Meta launches three branded smart glasses: Adventurer, Fury ($299), and Starfire ($399), $80 cheaper than last year's Ray-Ban model. Designed by Meta, produced by EssilorLuxottica, with camera, speaker, and AI features, aiming to attract consumers with lower prices.
items.why_zh: Meta以自有品牌和更低价格进军智能眼镜市场，可能改变可穿戴设备竞争格局。
items.why_en: Meta enters the smart glasses market with its own brand at lower prices, potentially reshaping the wearable device landscape.

items.title_zh: 奇瑞西班牙合资工厂启动新产线，最多可生产 5 款不同车型
items.title_en: Chery's Spanish Joint Venture Factory Launches New Production Line, Capable of Producing Up to 5 Different Models
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，据新华社报道，西班牙埃夫罗汽车集团 22 日宣布，其与中国汽车制造商奇瑞在巴塞罗那自由贸易区合资运营的埃夫罗工厂当天启用全新生产线，进一步提升产能。 据悉，新启用的 M1 生产线全长 696 米，设有 97 个工作站，单车生产周期约 75 分钟。目前，该生产线用于生产 EBRO S400 和 S700 各动力版本车型 ，设计上最多可生产 5 款不同车型，并为埃夫罗工厂 2027 年推出的纯电动车型预留产能。 ▲ EBRO S400 ▲ EBRO S700 该生产线的启用是埃夫罗汽车集团 逾 1.5 亿欧元 （IT之家注：现汇率约合 11.64 亿元人民币） 整体投资 的一部分，相关投资主要用于 工厂现代化改造、智能化升级和新产能建设 。目前，埃夫罗工厂已拥有超过 200 台参与不同工业流程的机器人，并正逐步引入焊接和喷漆工序。 埃夫罗汽车集团总裁拉斐尔 · 鲁伊斯表示，公司选择中企作为技术合作伙伴，意在将汽车领域的新技术和产业经验引入西班牙，并转化为本地工业能力和就业机会。
items.summary_en: Chery's joint venture factory in Barcelona has launched a new M1 production line, 696 meters long with 97 workstations, capable of producing up to 5 different models. The line currently produces EBRO S400 and S700, with capacity reserved for electric vehicles by 2027. The investment exceeds 150 million euros for modernization and intelligent upgrades.
items.why_zh: 该产线启动标志着中欧汽车产业合作深化，有助于提升当地工业能力和就业。
items.why_en: The launch of this production line signifies deepening China-Europe automotive cooperation, boosting local industrial capabilities and employment.

items.summary_zh: Meta推出了新一代智能眼镜，不再与Ray-Ban联名，而是以自有品牌销售。新眼镜有三种款式和七种颜色，其中一款与社交名媛Kylie Jenner合作。Meta此前与EssilorLuxottica及Ray-Ban合作进入智能眼镜市场，但如今选择独立发展。新眼镜价格更低，旨在扩大市场覆盖。
items.summary_en: For the past three years, "Meta" and "Ray-Ban" have been synonymous in the smart glasses space. Not anymore. Yesterday, I slipped on several pairs of Meta Glasses - no Ray-Bans - in three different styles and seven colors. One style, I was told several times by various enthusiastic Meta spokespeople, is a collaboration with socialite and reality TV star Kylie Jenner. Meta could've struck out on its own from the get-go, but teaming up with EssilorLuxottica and the Ray-Ban brand was a savvy move in entering the smart glasses space. Previous smart glasses looked straight out of a sci-fi flick, or…
items.why_zh: Meta脱离Ray-Ban推出更便宜智能眼镜，可能重塑智能眼镜市场格局。
items.why_en: Meta's launch of cheaper smart glasses without Ray-Ban could reshape the smart glasses market landscape.

items.title_zh: 摩尔线程发布 v340.150 显卡驱动：老旧平台兼容性升级，《异环》DX11 性能提升超 90%
items.title_en: Moore Threads Releases v340.150 GPU Driver: Legacy Platform Compatibility and Major Game Performance Boost
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，摩尔线程昨日发布了图形显卡驱动 v340.150，支持 MTT S80、MTT S70。 本次驱动更新在平台兼容性、专业创作支持以及游戏性能优化等多个维度均有重要升级，进一步拓展了摩尔线程显卡在娱乐与生产力场景下的适用边界。 在平台兼容性方面，v340.150 版本新增了对无 Resizable Bar 功能支持的老旧平台的支持。Resizable Bar 是让 CPU 一次性访问全部显存的技术，许多早期 CPU 与主板并不具备该功能。 新驱动通过底层优化实现了稳定兼容，让存量设备用户无需更换主板或处理器即可直接使用摩尔线程系列显卡，降低了硬件升级门槛与换机成本。 在专业创作与音视频处理领域，新驱动新增了对开源音视频框架 FFmpeg 中 Vulkan 视频编解码的支持，开发者与创作者可基于标准 API 直接调用 GPU 的硬件级视频加速能力。 同时，新驱动深化了对 Blender Vulkan 后端的支持，显著提升了关键创作场景下的系统稳定性。此外，自研的 MTVSR 实时视频超分技术也迎来专项升级，通过 AI 重建算法大幅提升了低分辨率、低画质片源在播放时的画面细腻度与清晰度。 游戏性能优化是本次驱动的核心升级方向之一。根据摩尔线程官方数据，在多款热门游戏中，新驱动带来了显著的帧率提升：《欧陆风云 5》性能提升超过 150%；《异环》在 Dire…
items.summary_en: Moore Threads released GPU driver v340.150 for MTT S80/S70, adding support for legacy platforms without Resizable Bar, FFmpeg Vulkan video encode/decode, and improved Blender Vulkan backend. Game performance sees major gains: Europa Universalis V up 150%, and Ananta DX11 performance up over 90%.
items.why_zh: 该驱动显著提升了摩尔线程显卡的兼容性和游戏性能，有助于扩大其市场份额。
items.why_en: This driver significantly improves compatibility and gaming performance, helping Moore Threads expand its market share.

items.title_zh: 网易发布 Confucius4-TTS：业内首个支持 14 种语言跨语种无口音、且无需参考文本即可完成语音克隆的开源模型，3 秒音频即可克隆音色
items.title_en: NetEase Releases Confucius4-TTS: Open-Source Model for Accent-Free Cross-Lingual Voice Cloning in 14 Languages
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，网易有道今日发文，宣布推出“子曰 4.0”TTS 语音合成引擎 ——Confucius4-TTS。 据网易有道官方介绍，Confucius4-TTS 是业内首个支持 14 种语言跨语种无口音、且无需参考文本即可完成语音克隆的开源模型。 在技术性能方面，Confucius4-TTS 实现了零样本语音克隆能力。用户仅需提供 3 秒音频素材，无需参考文本与前期训练，模型即可完成音色克隆，克隆音色与原声相似度超过 85%，克隆任务准确度达 97%。 据介绍，该模型全面支持中文、英语、西班牙语、法语、德语、韩语、泰语、越南语等 14 种语言的自然流利表达。其核心突破在于解决了语音合成领域长期存在的跨语种口音问题 —— 用户上传中文音频，AI 即可用该音色流利说出日语、英语等外语，发音地道自然。 在情感表达方面，Confucius4-TTS 区别于传统 TTS 依赖文本标签控制情感的粗放方式，创新性地支持音频 Prompt 情感克隆迁移。系统可自动提取参考音频中的情感特征，精准复刻其语调、韵律，实现跨语种无损迁移。 在底层架构上，Confucius4-TTS 实现了全面革新。相较于初代 EmotiVoice 采用的 HiFi-GAN 声码器和 Speaker ID 查表方案，Confucius4-TTS 引入了 GPT 式语义大模型作为主干，搭配基于 SSL 预…
items.summary_en: NetEase Youdao launched Confucius4-TTS, an open-source TTS model supporting accent-free cross-lingual voice cloning in 14 languages with only 3 seconds of audio and no reference text. It achieves 85% similarity and 97% accuracy, and supports emotion cloning via audio prompts. The architecture uses a GPT-style semantic model with SSL pretraining.
items.why_zh: 该模型在跨语种语音克隆和情感迁移方面取得突破，将推动多语言语音合成应用的发展。
items.why_en: This model breaks new ground in cross-lingual voice cloning and emotion transfer, advancing multilingual TTS applications.

items.summary_zh: Abu Dhabi’s MGX Raises About $50 Billion to Accelerate AI Deals Bloomberg
items.summary_en: Abu Dhabi's AI investment firm MGX has raised approximately $50 billion to accelerate AI deals, focusing on AI infrastructure, technology companies, and projects. This underscores Abu Dhabi's ambition to become a global AI leader.
items.why_zh: 500亿美元的规模表明阿布扎比正全力押注AI，可能重塑全球AI投资格局。
items.why_en: The $50 billion fund signals Abu Dhabi's full commitment to AI, potentially reshaping global AI investment.

items.title_zh: 两周后解禁扩容：智谱万亿市值大考
items.title_en: Lock-Up Expiry in Two Weeks: Zhipu's Trillion-Yuan Valuation Test
items.summary_zh: 两周后解禁扩容：智谱万亿市值大考 东方财富
items.summary_en: Zhipu faces a lock-up expiry in two weeks, testing its trillion-yuan valuation as a large number of shares become tradable. The article analyzes fundamentals, market sentiment, and potential impact, noting that while short-term volatility is possible, Zhipu's technology and market position support its long-term value.
items.why_zh: 解禁事件将检验智谱万亿估值的市场认可度，可能引发股价波动。
items.why_en: The lock-up expiry will test market confidence in Zhipu's trillion-yuan valuation, potentially causing stock volatility.

items.title_zh: 以“高导热+高强韧”镁合金切入机器人等高端制造领域，「宜镁华」完成数千万元天使轮融资｜36氪首发
items.title_en: Yimeihua Raises Tens of Millions in Angel Round for High-Thermal-Conductivity Magnesium Alloys in Robotics
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，「宜镁华」近期宣布完成数千万元天使轮融资。本轮融资由星河创投与华中实业集团投资。资金将用于产能建设、研发投入和团队扩充等。 宜镁华专注于镁合金材料研发，零部件开发设计与零部件产品制造，背靠上海交通大学轻合金精密成型国家工程研究中心，自研高导高强合金设计技术、超高导热复材设计及界面调控技术与半固态注塑成型工艺，切入机器人关节电机模组、外骨骼、汽车结构件等高附加值场景，目前已与包含头部机器人本体厂商在内的超10家机器人本体、零部件厂商开展合作，确定镁合金替代产品超15种，并且获得多个汽车领域客户定点。 公司创始人兼CEO程轩挺是上海交通大学材料工程硕士、复旦大学MBA，拥有20余年汽车行业产业化经验，曾主导技术产业化项目实现年营收超16亿元，后创立苏州和健汽车科技成功开发吉利、智己等头部客户。 以配方和工艺创新，突破镁合金性能局限 “新能源汽车变得越来越重，加上各种智能硬件，每辆车上市时实际重量都远超最初设定，所以轻量化成了车企必须解决的难题。”程轩挺告诉36氪，车企客户对轻量化材料的迫切需求是他创立宜镁华的直接动因。 在所有结构金属中，镁的密度仅为1.8g/cm³，比铝轻33%，比钢轻77%，是名副其实的“最轻结构金属”。并且我国镁资源储量丰富，近年来在《节能与新能源汽车技术路线图2.0》、《有色金属行业稳增长工作方案（2025-2026年）》等政策引导下，我国镁产量不断…
items.summary_en: Yimeihua completed a tens-of-millions angel round led by Xinghe VC and Huazhong Industrial Group. The company develops high-thermal-conductivity and high-strength magnesium alloys for robotics joints, exoskeletons, and automotive parts. It has partnered with over 10 robotics firms and secured multiple automotive contracts.
items.why_zh: 镁合金轻量化材料在机器人和汽车领域需求旺盛，宜镁华的技术有望推动高端制造轻量化。
items.why_en: Magnesium alloys are in high demand for lightweighting in robotics and automotive; Yimeihua's technology could advance lightweight manufacturing.

items.title_zh: 以开源模型挑战美国霸主地位，英国政府斥资 6000 万英镑建 AI 实验室
items.title_en: UK Government Invests £60M in AI Labs to Develop Open-Source Models, Challenging US Dominance
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，英国政府今天宣布拨款 6000 万英镑（现汇率约合 5.39 亿元人民币），为牛津大学、伦敦大学学院（UCL）建立两座 AI 实验室。 旨在开发低硬件需求的开源 AI 模型 ， 减少依赖美国大型科技公司产品 。 据悉，牛津大学、UCL 将共同参与该项目，共同设计 AI 基础数学理论、改进 AI 模型架构、开发低算力需求的 AI 系统，与美国等国家普遍采用的闭源、高算力方案形成鲜明对比。 英国 AI 事务部长 Kanishka Narayan 指出，新实验室将让 AI 变得更便宜、更容易部署、更实用，让更多企业和公共服务都能接入 AI，确保英国处于领先地位。 此外，两所大学还将拨款 200 万英镑（IT之家注：现汇率约合 1795.8 万元人民币）培养博士生，并至少招聘 10 名研究人员，扩大 AI 人才库储备。
items.summary_en: The UK government invests £60M in two AI labs at Oxford and UCL to develop open-source, low-hardware-requirement AI models, challenging US dominance. An additional £2M will fund PhDs and researchers.
items.why_zh: 英国此举旨在通过开源低算力模型打破美国在AI领域的垄断，推动AI民主化。
items.why_en: The UK aims to break US AI monopoly by developing open-source, low-compute models, democratizing AI access.

items.title_zh: 豆包视频生成大模型Seedance 2.5 亮相，预计 7 月初正式发布- OSCHINA - 开源 × AI · 开发者生态社区
items.title_en: Doubao Video Generation Model Seedance 2.5 Debuts, Expected to Launch in Early July
items.summary_zh: 豆包视频生成大模型Seedance 2.5 亮相，预计 7 月初正式发布- OSCHINA - 开源 × AI · 开发者生态社区 OSCHINA
items.summary_en: Doubao's Seedance 2.5 video generation model debuts, set for release in early July. It promises improved quality and creativity in AI-generated videos.
items.why_zh: Seedance 2.5的发布标志着AI视频生成技术的重大进步，将影响内容创作行业。
items.why_en: The launch of Seedance 2.5 marks a significant advancement in AI video generation, impacting the content creation industry.

items.title_zh: 豆包大模型 2.1 发布 - OSCHINA - 开源 × AI · 开发者生态社区
items.title_en: Doubao Large Model 2.1 Released
items.summary_zh: 豆包大模型 2.1 发布 - OSCHINA - 开源 × AI · 开发者生态社区 OSCHINA
items.summary_en: Doubao releases version 2.1 of its large model, with improvements in performance and efficiency, strengthening its NLP and multimodal capabilities.
items.why_zh: 豆包大模型2.1的发布展示了字节跳动在AI领域的持续投入和技术进步。
items.why_en: The release of Doubao 2.1 demonstrates ByteDance's continued investment and progress in AI technology.

items.title_zh: 180万亿Token，增长超10倍！豆包，新发布
items.title_en: Doubao Model Trained on 180 Trillion Tokens, Over 10x Growth
items.summary_zh: 180万亿Token，增长超10倍！豆包，新发布 搜狐网
items.summary_en: Doubao's large model now trained on 180 trillion tokens, a tenfold increase, boosting performance and solidifying its leading position in China's AI landscape.
items.why_zh: 训练数据量的大幅增长是模型能力提升的关键，凸显了豆包在数据规模和模型训练上的优势。
items.why_en: The massive increase in training data is key to model improvement, highlighting Doubao's advantage in data scale and training.

items.title_zh: 字节豆包Seed2.1 正式发布：深入 AI 生产力，三大能力比肩 GPT-5.5
items.title_en: ByteDance's Doubao Seed2.1 Released: Three Capabilities Rival GPT-5.5
items.summary_zh: 字节豆包Seed2.1 正式发布：深入 AI 生产力，三大能力比肩 GPT-5.5 DoNews
items.summary_en: ByteDance's Doubao released Seed2.1, claiming its three core capabilities rival GPT-5.5, focusing on AI productivity with enhanced language understanding, generation, and reasoning. This marks ByteDance's continued progress in large language models.
items.why_zh: Seed2.1对标GPT-5.5，显示字节跳动在AI大模型领域的竞争力，可能改变办公和创作工具市场。
items.why_en: Seed2.1's claim to rival GPT-5.5 shows ByteDance's competitiveness in LLMs, potentially reshaping productivity and creative tools.

items.title_zh: 信号与噪声：利用开源情报检测AI失控
items.title_en: Signals in the Noise: Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) for AI Loss of Control Detection
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了如何运用开源情报（OSINT）和网络威胁情报（CTI）方法来检测AI系统是否脱离人类控制。通过跨学科文献综述和14次半结构化专家访谈，论文开发了两种威胁模型，识别了一系列可观测的痕迹，并提出了一个用于监控的制度架构。研究发现，基于OSINT的失控检测部分可行，且值得现在开始建设。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20610v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper applies open-source intelligence (OSINT) and cyber threat intelligence (CTI) methodologies to the problem of detecting AI systems operating outside human control. Drawing on a cross-disciplinary literature review and 14 semi-structured expert interviews conducted under Chatham House Rule, the paper develops two threat models, identifies a range of observable traces, and proposes an institutional architecture for monitoring. The research finds that OSINT-based detection of loss of control is partially feasible and worth building now.…
items.why_zh: 该研究为AI安全监控提供了实用方法，有助于及早发现AI失控风险。
items.why_en: This research provides practical methods for AI safety monitoring, helping detect loss-of-control risks early.

items.title_zh: L20-Edu-135M：单GPU数据高效小语言模型的可审计研究
items.title_en: L20-Edu-135M: An Auditable Single-GPU Study of Data-Efficient Small Language Modeling
items.summary_zh: 该研究探索了在极端资源受限条件下训练小语言模型的可能性。研究人员使用单个NVIDIA L20 GPU，完整训练了一个134.5M参数的模型，仅使用约130亿个预训练token（100亿FineWeb-Edu token和30亿教育、数学、代码及推理混合数据）。最终发布的检查点L20-Edu-135M展示了在单GPU上实现数据高效语言建模的可行性，为资源有限的环境提供了可审计的基准。该工作强调了小模型在本地硬件上的部署优势，并公开了架构细节以促进可重复性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22189v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Small language models are cheap to serve and feasible on local hardware, but strong public 135M-class systems are commonly trained with hundreds of billions to trillions of tokens on large clusters. We study a sharply resource-constrained regime: a complete 134.5M-parameter language-model pipeline executed on one NVIDIA L20 GPU. The released checkpoint, L20-Edu-135M, receives approximately 13B pretraining tokens: 10B FineWeb-Edu tokens followed by a 3B-token educational, mathematics, code, and reasoning mixture. We document the architecture, da…
items.why_zh: 该研究证明了在单GPU上训练有竞争力的小语言模型的可行性，大幅降低了硬件门槛。
items.why_en: This work demonstrates the feasibility of training competitive small language models on a single GPU, significantly lowering hardware barriers.

items.title_zh: 自信地错误：攻击偏移下提示注入检测器的严重性感知校准
items.title_en: Confidently Wrong: Severity-Aware Calibration of Prompt-Injection Detectors under Attack Shift
items.summary_zh: 该研究关注提示注入检测器在攻击分布偏移时的置信度校准问题。作者评估了三个已发布的检测器（ProtectAI-v2和两个Prompt-Guard-2检查点），在单一源校准阈值下，将其迁移到五种不同的攻击偏移场景。他们提出了一种严重性度量S，用于衡量检测器在攻击样本上的置信度水平。研究发现，当攻击分布偏离原始基准时，检测器可能以高置信度做出错误判断，这凸显了在部署中考虑攻击偏移的重要性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22659v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Prompt-injection detectors are deployed as guards: a model scores an input and a downstream system trusts or blocks it on that score. I study the confidence of these scores, not only their accuracy, when the attack distribution shifts away from the clean benchmark on which the operating point was chosen. I evaluate three released detectors, ProtectAI-v2 and two Prompt-Guard-2 checkpoints, at a single source-calibrated threshold that I freeze and transport across five shifts. I report a severity metric S, how confident a detector is on the attac…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了提示注入检测器在攻击偏移下可能高置信度出错，对安全部署具有重要警示意义。
items.why_en: This work reveals that prompt-injection detectors can be confidently wrong under attack shifts, providing critical warnings for secure deployment.

items.title_zh: 泄漏感知的LLM预测基准测试：实时现在预测作为宏观因子排序的决策时间输入
items.title_en: Leakage-Aware Benchmarking of LLM Forecasting: Real-Time Nowcasts as the Decision-Time Input for Macro Factor Ranking
items.summary_zh: 该研究指出，检索增强型LLM的预测基准常常混淆模型能力与信息泄漏问题。作者构建了一个泄漏控制的股票因子排序系统，使用检索增强的7B开源LLM预测器。在2023年4月至2026年3月期间，每个月底预测器仅能观察到决策时刻的信息：滞后调整的FRED宏观变量、近期宏观事件摘要以及克利夫兰联储存档的每日CPI现在预测。通过这种方式，研究旨在更准确地评估LLM的真实预测能力，避免因未来信息泄漏导致的虚假表现。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22719v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Forecasting benchmarks for retrieval-augmented LLMs routinely confound model capability with information leakage: features labeled with a target's timestamp are often not observable at the system's decision time. We study leakage-controlled equity factor ranking with a retrieval-augmented 7B open-source LLM forecaster. At each month-end from 2023-04 to 2026-03, the forecaster observes only decision-time information: lag-shifted FRED macro variables, recent macro-event summaries, and the Cleveland Fed's archived daily CPI nowcast for unreleased…
items.why_zh: 该研究提出了泄漏感知的基准测试方法，有助于更真实地评估LLM的预测能力。
items.why_en: This work proposes a leakage-aware benchmarking approach to more realistically evaluate LLM forecasting capabilities.

items.title_zh: 从少中学：解锁内部表示以实现基准压缩
items.title_en: Learning More from Less: Unlocking Internal Representations for Benchmark Compression
items.summary_zh: 评估大型语言模型（LLM）的高昂成本促使研究者寻找全量基准测试的高效替代方案。现有方法通常从大量源模型的响应模式中识别一个小核心集来近似全基准性能，但当源模型池较小时，这种估计变得统计不稳定。本文提出利用LLM的内部表示来压缩基准，从而在源模型数量有限的情况下也能可靠地选择核心集。该方法特别适用于新发布的、历史评估数据稀少的基准，有望大幅降低LLM评估成本。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.00710v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The prohibitive cost of evaluating Large Language Models (LLMs) necessitates efficient alternatives to full-scale benchmarking. Prevalent approaches address this by identifying a small coreset of items to approximate full-benchmark performance. However, existing methods must estimate a reliable item profile from response patterns across many source models, which becomes statistically unstable when the source pool is small. This dependency is particularly limiting for newly released benchmarks with minimal historical evaluation data. We argue…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过利用内部表示压缩基准，显著降低了LLM评估成本，尤其适用于新基准。
items.why_en: This work reduces LLM evaluation costs by compressing benchmarks using internal representations, especially beneficial for new benchmarks.

items.title_zh: 智能体技能框架：中小型语言模型在工业环境中的潜力视角
items.title_en: Agent Skill Framework: Perspectives on the Potential of Small to Medium Language Models in Industrial Environments
items.summary_zh: 智能体技能被主流智能体框架广泛支持，并在专有模型上表现良好，但其对中小型开源语言模型（270M-80B参数）的有效性尚待探索。本研究系统性地考察了资源受限工业环境中的技能范式，其中由于数据安全和预算限制，依赖专有API不切实际。在两项开源任务和一项真实保险索赔分类任务中，研究发现非常小的模型难以可靠地进行技能选择，但中等规模模型在适当微调后可以取得不错效果。该工作为在工业环境中部署中小型语言模型作为智能体提供了实用指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.16653v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Agent skills are widely supported by major agentic frameworks and perform well with proprietary models, yet their effectiveness for small and medium-sized open source language models (270 M-80B) remains underexplored. We systematically study the Skill paradigm in resource-constrained industrial settings, where reliance on proprietary APIs is impractical due to data security and budget constraints. Across two open-source tasks and a real-world insurance claims classification task, we find that very small models struggle with reliable skill sel…
items.why_zh: 该研究为在工业环境中有效利用中小型开源语言模型作为智能体提供了关键见解。
items.why_en: This work provides key insights for effectively using small to medium open-source language models as agents in industrial environments.

items.title_zh: 即时适应量化：配置感知LoRA用于高效微调量化LLM
items.title_en: On-the-Fly Adaptation to Quantization: Configuration-Aware LoRA for Efficient Fine-Tuning of Quantized LLMs
items.summary_zh: 随着预训练模型规模不断增大，在边缘设备上部署需要有效压缩。近期工作将量化与高精度LoRA适配器的微调相结合，可大幅减小模型尺寸同时缓解量化带来的精度损失。然而，边缘设备具有异构能力，为每种量化设置进行配置级微调计算成本过高。本文提出配置感知LoRA（C-LoRA），能够即时适应不同的量化配置，无需为每种设置单独微调。该方法在保持性能的同时显著降低了计算开销，适用于资源异构的边缘设备场景。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2509.25214v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: As increasingly large pre-trained models are released, deploying them on edge devices for privacy-preserving applications requires effective compression. Recent works combine quantization with the fine-tuning of high-precision LoRA adapters, which can substantially reduce model size while mitigating the accuracy loss from quantization. However, edge devices have inherently heterogeneous capabilities, while performing configuration-wise fine-tuning for every quantization setting is computationally prohibitive. In this paper, we propose C…
items.why_zh: 该研究实现了量化LLM的即时适应，大幅降低了边缘设备部署的计算成本。
items.why_en: This work enables on-the-fly adaptation of quantized LLMs, significantly reducing computational costs for edge deployment.

items.title_zh: 前沿LLM准备好应对网络安全了吗？来自双模式漏洞基准的垂直基础模型证据
items.title_en: Are Frontier LLMs Ready for Cybersecurity? Evidence for Vertical Foundation Models from Dual-Mode Vulnerability Benchmarks
items.summary_zh: 该研究通过双模式基准评估前沿LLM的网络安全能力：白盒函数级漏洞检测（VulnLLM-R，涵盖C/Java/Python）和黑盒Web应用安全测试（五个生产风格应用，包含118个真实漏洞，覆盖20多个CWE类别）。测试了六个前沿模型（GPT-5.4、Codex~5.3、Claude Opus~4.7、Sonnet~4.6、Gemini~3.1~Pro和Gemini~3~Flash）以及两个领域专用模型，采用四种测试范式。研究结果揭示了当前LLM在网络安全任务中的优势和不足，为构建垂直基础模型提供了证据。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.23243v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We evaluate whether frontier LLMs are ready for cybersecurity through a dual-mode benchmark: white-box function-level vulnerability detection (VulnLLM-R, across C/Java/Python) and black-box web application security testing (five production-style applications with 118 ground-truth vulnerabilities across 20+ CWE families, which we will open-source). We test six frontier models (GPT-5.4, Codex~5.3, Claude Opus~4.7, Sonnet~4.6, Gemini~3.1~Pro and Gemini~3~Flash) and two domain-specialized models across four testing paradigms. Our findings a…
items.why_zh: 该研究系统评估了前沿LLM的网络安全能力，为构建领域专用基础模型提供了重要参考。
items.why_en: This work systematically evaluates frontier LLMs' cybersecurity capabilities, providing important references for building domain-specific foundation models.

items.title_zh: CAT-Translate：构建日英翻译的紧凑开源模型
items.title_en: CAT-Translate: Building Compact Open-Source Models for Japanese-English Translation
items.summary_zh: 当前大型多语言翻译模型在机器翻译基准上表现出色，但若只需支持特定语言对，是否值得开发专用翻译模型？为回答此问题，研究者开发了一系列专用于日英双向翻译的小型语言模型（0.8B、1.4B、3.3B和7B参数）。采用两阶段监督微调策略，这些紧凑模型在保持高性能的同时大幅降低了计算和存储需求。实验表明，针对特定语言对开发的专用小模型可以在资源效率与翻译质量之间取得良好平衡，为实际部署提供了经济高效的方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.21413v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Nowadays, large multilingual translation models demonstrate impressive translation capabilities in the machine translation benchmarks. This raises a practical question to the developers: is it worth developing translation models specialized for a particular language pair if you only need to support that language pair? To give an anecdotal answer to this question, we develop a family of small language models (0.8B, 1.4B, 3.3B, and 7B parameters) specialized for Japanese-English bidirectional translation. We employ a two-stage supervised fine-tun…
items.why_zh: 该研究证明了针对特定语言对开发专用紧凑翻译模型的实用性和经济性。
items.why_en: This work demonstrates the practicality and cost-effectiveness of developing specialized compact translation models for a specific language pair.

items.title_zh: 可解释机器学习预测初创公司融资、专利和退出
items.title_en: Interpretable Machine Learning for Predicting Startup Funding, Patenting, and Exits
items.summary_zh: 该研究开发了一个可解释的机器学习框架，用于预测初创公司的融资、专利和退出结果。研究基于Crunchbase和USPTO数据构建了2010-2023年的公司季度面板数据，评估了三个时间范围：12个月内下一轮融资、24个月内专利存量增长、36个月内通过IPO或收购退出。预处理在2010-2019年的开发窗口上拟合，并保持不变地应用于后续队列。该框架旨在提高预测透明度和可解释性，帮助投资者和政策制定者理解关键驱动因素。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.09465v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: This study develops an interpretable machine learning framework to forecast startup outcomes, including funding, patenting, and exit. A firm-quarter panel for 2010-2023 is constructed from Crunchbase and matched to U.S. Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) data. Three horizons are evaluated: next funding within 12 months, patent-stock growth within 24 months, and exit through an initial public offering (IPO) or acquisition within 36 months. Preprocessing is fit on a development window (2010-2019) and applied without change to later cohorts to…
items.why_zh: 该研究提供了可解释的预测工具，有助于理解初创公司成功的关键因素，对投资决策和政策制定具有重要参考价值。
items.why_en: This interpretable ML framework offers transparent predictions of startup success, aiding investors and policymakers in understanding key drivers.

items.summary_zh: 【 点此直达升级教程 】 IT之家 6 月 24 日消息，苹果今日向 Apple Watch 用户推送了 watchOS 27.0 开发者预览版 Beta 2 更新（内部版本号：24R5305g），本次更新距离上次发布 Beta/RC 间隔 15 天。 如何升级 iOS / iPadOS / watchOS / macOS 开发版和公测版？ • 公开测试版 ：需注册 Apple Beta 版软件计划 ，之后通过【设置】【通用】【软件更新】【Beta 版更新】来升级； • 开发预览版 ：需登录注册 苹果开发者计划 ，之后通过【设置】【通用】【软件更新】来升级。 附苹果 iOS 历史固件下载大全： 《 苹果 iOS / iPadOS / macOS 固件下载 / 更新日志大全 》 本文由机器人发布，IT之家稍后将为大家带来具体更新内容。 附 watchOS 27 发布历史： 2026-06-09：watchOS 27 Beta (24R5289n) IT之家小伙伴如果找到更多新内容，可以在投稿或评论区中提出你的发现~[微笑]

items.why_zh: 李金铭的回应反映了公众对综艺节目真实性和艺人权益的关注，具有社会讨论价值。
items.why_en: Li Jinming's response highlights public concern over variety show authenticity and artist rights, sparking valuable social discussion.

items.title_zh: Anthropic发布Claude Tag，可在Salesforce的Slack应用中跨频道工作
items.title_en: Anthropic releases Claude Tag to work across channels in Salesforce's Slack app
items.summary_zh: Anthropic推出了Claude Tag功能，允许其AI助手Claude在Salesforce旗下的Slack应用中跨频道协作。用户可以通过标签@Claude在任意频道中调用AI，实现信息查询、任务协助等功能。此举旨在提升企业团队协作效率，将AI深度集成到日常工作流中。
items.summary_en: Anthropic releases Claude Tag to work across channels in Salesforce's Slack app Seeking Alpha
items.why_zh: Claude Tag将AI无缝融入企业通讯工具，标志着AI助手在办公协作场景中的深度应用。
items.why_en: Claude Tag integrates AI seamlessly into enterprise communication tools, marking deep AI application in workplace collaboration.

items.title_zh: 英伟达发布Halos机器人安全系统，业界首个面向物理AI的全栈安全方案
items.title_en: NVIDIA Announces Halos for Robotics, the Industry’s 1st Full-Stack Safety System for Physical AI
items.summary_zh: 英伟达发布了Halos机器人安全系统，这是业界首个面向物理AI的全栈安全解决方案。Halos涵盖了从芯片到算法的多层次安全防护，旨在确保机器人在真实环境中安全运行。该系统针对自动驾驶、工业机器人等应用场景，提供实时监控、故障检测和风险规避能力。
items.summary_en: NVIDIA Announces Halos for Robotics, the Industry’s 1st Full-Stack Safety System for Physical AI HPCwire
items.why_zh: Halos填补了物理AI安全领域的空白，为机器人广泛应用提供了关键安全保障。
items.why_en: Halos fills a gap in physical AI safety, providing critical security for widespread robot deployment.

items.title_zh: Anthropic为Claude新增身份验证，但无法挽救Fable 5免于特朗普禁令
items.title_en: Anthropic’s New ID Checks for Claude Won’t Save Fable 5 From Trump’s Ban
items.summary_zh: Anthropic为其AI助手Claude引入了新的身份验证措施，旨在提升安全性。然而，这一举措无法改变特朗普政府此前对Fable 5的禁令。Fable 5是一款基于Claude的AI应用，因涉嫌违反相关规定而被禁。Anthropic的新措施可能有助于未来合规，但当前禁令依然有效。
items.summary_en: Anthropic’s New ID Checks for Claude Won’t Save Fable 5 From Trump’s Ban Gizmodo
items.why_zh: 该事件凸显了AI应用在政策合规方面的挑战，以及技术措施与政治决策之间的张力。
items.why_en: This incident highlights the challenges of AI app compliance with policies and the tension between technical measures and political decisions.

items.title_zh: Anthropic新增身份验证，Fable 5仍被禁
items.title_en: Anthropic Adds ID Checks as Fable 5 Remains Banned
items.summary_zh: Anthropic宣布为AI助手Claude增加身份验证功能，以加强用户身份确认。然而，基于Claude的应用Fable 5依然处于被禁状态。Anthropic表示将继续与监管机构合作，但未透露解禁时间表。此举是Anthropic在AI安全与合规方面的最新努力。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Adds ID Checks as Fable 5 Remains Banned Let's Data Science
items.why_zh: Anthropic在加强安全措施的同时，Fable 5的禁令未解除，反映了AI应用监管的复杂性。
items.why_en: Anthropic's security upgrade contrasts with the ongoing ban on Fable 5, illustrating the complexity of AI app regulation.

items.title_zh: LiveRamp CEO谈OpenAI合作及即将到来的Publicis收购
items.title_en: LiveRamp CEO dishes on OpenAI partnership, looming Publicis acquisition
items.summary_zh: LiveRamp首席执行官在采访中透露了与OpenAI的合作细节，以及阳狮集团（Publicis）即将进行的收购。合作将利用AI技术提升数据连接和营销效果，而收购则可能重塑广告技术格局。CEO表示，这些举措将推动公司向AI驱动的数据平台转型。
items.summary_en: LiveRamp CEO dishes on OpenAI partnership, looming Publicis acquisition Marketing Dive
items.why_zh: LiveRamp与OpenAI的合作及Publicis的收购，标志着AI在广告和数据营销领域的深度融合。
items.why_en: The OpenAI partnership and Publicis acquisition signal deep AI integration in advertising and data marketing.

items.title_zh: Ubotica融资1100万美元，扩展海洋情报平台
items.title_en: Ubotica raises $11 million to scale maritime-intelligence platform
items.summary_zh: 太空技术公司Ubotica获得了1100万美元融资，用于扩展其海洋情报平台。该平台利用卫星数据和AI分析，提供船舶追踪、海洋监测等服务。资金将用于提升平台能力、扩大市场覆盖，并加强在海洋安全、环境监测等领域的应用。
items.summary_en: Ubotica raises $11 million to scale maritime-intelligence platform SpaceNews
items.why_zh: Ubotica的融资表明AI在海洋监测领域的商业价值日益凸显。
items.why_en: Ubotica's funding highlights the growing commercial value of AI in maritime monitoring.

items.title_zh: 情报机构警告：AI模型数月内可能发动毁灭性网络攻击
items.title_en: Intelligence agencies warn AI models could launch crippling cyberattacks in months
items.summary_zh: 多家情报机构联合发出警告，称先进AI模型可能在数月内被用于发动毁灭性网络攻击。这些攻击可能针对关键基础设施，如电网、金融系统等，造成严重破坏。报告呼吁政府和企业立即加强防御措施，并制定AI安全标准。
items.summary_en: Intelligence agencies warn AI models could launch crippling cyberattacks in months The Hill
items.why_zh: 这一警告凸显了AI安全风险的紧迫性，需全球协作防范AI驱动的网络威胁。
items.why_en: The warning underscores the urgency of AI security risks, requiring global cooperation to prevent AI-driven cyber threats.

items.title_zh: DARA将在美国召开国际监管工作组及AI监管会议
items.title_en: DARA to Convene International Regulatory Task Forces and AI Regulation Sessions in the U.S.
items.summary_zh: 数字资产监管联盟（DARA）宣布将在美国召开国际监管工作组会议和AI监管专题会议。会议将聚集全球监管机构、行业专家，讨论AI技术的监管框架和标准制定。此举旨在协调各国AI监管政策，促进国际合作。
items.summary_en: DARA to Convene International Regulatory Task Forces and AI Regulation Sessions in the U.S. GlobeNewswire
items.why_zh: DARA的会议将推动全球AI监管协调，有助于形成统一的国际标准。
items.why_en: DARA's meetings will promote global AI regulatory coordination, helping to establish unified international standards.

items.title_zh: AI初创公司Engram仅13名员工，获9800万美元融资，估值达6亿美元
items.title_en: AI startup Engram raises $98 million at $600 million valuation with just 13 employees
items.summary_zh: AI初创公司Engram以6亿美元估值完成9800万美元融资，而该公司仅有13名员工。这一高估值反映了市场对AI领域小型精英团队的强烈信心。Engram专注于开发先进的人工智能模型，尽管团队规模极小，但其技术实力和增长潜力吸引了大量投资。此次融资将用于扩大团队和加速产品研发。
items.summary_en: AI startup Engram raises $98 million at $600 million valuation with just 13 employees CTech
items.why_zh: 这凸显了AI领域对小型精英团队的高估值趋势，以及资本对前沿技术的高度追捧。
items.why_en: It highlights the trend of high valuations for small, elite AI teams and strong capital interest in cutting-edge technology.

items.title_zh: GPT-5如何帮助免疫学家Derya Unutmaz解开三年未解之谜
items.title_en: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary_zh: 免疫学家Derya Unutmaz利用OpenAI的GPT-5模型，成功解决了一个困扰其团队三年的科学难题。GPT-5通过分析大量免疫学数据，提出了新的假设，并帮助设计实验验证，最终揭示了关键机制。这一案例展示了大型语言模型在科学研究中的巨大潜力，尤其是在数据分析和假设生成方面。Unutmaz表示，AI工具正在改变科学发现的方式，加速了从数据到洞察的进程。
items.summary_en: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery OpenAI
items.why_zh: 这展示了大型语言模型在科学研究中的实际应用价值，有望加速各领域的突破性发现。
items.why_en: It demonstrates the practical value of large language models in scientific research, potentially accelerating breakthroughs across fields.

items.title_zh: 企业AI超级政治行动委员会为何在地方选举中花费2700万美元
items.title_en: Why corporate AI super PACs spent $27 million on a local election
items.summary_zh: 企业支持的AI超级政治行动委员会（Super PAC）在近期一场地方选举中投入了2700万美元，引发关注。这些资金主要用于支持对AI行业友好的候选人，以影响地方监管政策。随着AI技术快速发展，企业希望通过政治捐款确保有利的立法环境，尤其是在数据隐私、算法责任和税收等方面。此举反映了科技巨头日益增强的政治影响力，以及AI行业对政策制定的高度重视。
items.summary_en: Hello and welcome to Regulator , the newsletter for Verge subscribers chronicling the misadventures of their favorite tech overlords and Washington swamp creatures. ("Favorite" is, of course, subjective.) Not a subscriber yet? Sign up here , especially if you want the hot scoop on quality Amazon Prime Day deals recommended by the wonderful humans of The Verge's newsroom, and not by a slop algorithm. Some news: The Verge now has a special subscription price of $10 / year for students with a valid email address ! It gets you everything that a regular subscription gets: ad-free podcasts, subscrib…
items.why_zh: 这表明AI企业正积极通过政治捐款影响监管政策，以维护行业利益，凸显了科技与政治的交织。
items.why_en: It shows AI companies actively using political donations to influence regulation, highlighting the intersection of technology and politics.

items.title_zh: 万卡超算集群首次公开！国产算力突破核心瓶颈，AI与量子计算融合新纪元已至
items.title_en: 10,000-card supercomputing cluster unveiled: domestic computing power breaks core bottleneck, ushering in a new era of AI-quantum computing integration
items.summary_zh: 万卡超算集群首次公开！国产算力突破核心瓶颈，AI与量子计算融合新纪元已至 新浪财经
items.summary_en: China's first 10,000-card supercomputing cluster was unveiled, marking a breakthrough in domestic computing power. It overcomes bottlenecks in large-scale parallel computing and supports AI-quantum computing integration, boosting self-reliance in advanced technologies.
items.why_zh: 这标志着国产算力达到新高度，为AI和量子计算融合研究提供了关键基础设施，具有战略意义。
items.why_en: It marks a new milestone in domestic computing power, providing critical infrastructure for AI and quantum computing integration, with strategic significance.

items.title_zh: 英伟达最新AI突破可能不是芯片，而是推动下一波数据中心热潮
items.title_en: Nvidia's Latest AI Breakthrough May Not Be a Chip - And It Could Fuel the Next Data Center Boom
items.summary_zh: 英伟达的最新AI突破可能并非硬件芯片，而是软件或系统层面的创新，有望推动下一波数据中心建设热潮。这一突破可能优化AI工作负载的效率，降低能耗，从而加速数据中心扩张。市场对此高度关注，认为英伟达将继续引领AI基础设施发展。
items.summary_en: Nvidia's Latest AI Breakthrough May Not Be a Chip - And It Could Fuel the Next Data Center Boom 24/7 Wall St.
items.why_zh: 英伟达的非芯片AI创新可能重新定义数据中心架构，对AI基础设施投资产生重大影响。
items.why_en: Nvidia's non-chip AI innovation could reshape data center architecture, significantly impacting AI infrastructure investment.

items.title_zh: 黑石计划投资300亿美元建设日本AI数据中心
items.title_en: Blackstone plans $30 billion investment in Japan AI data centres, Nikkei reports
items.summary_zh: 据日经新闻报道，黑石集团计划投资300亿美元在日本建设AI数据中心。这一大规模投资反映了全球对AI基础设施需求的激增，以及日本作为AI发展热点的吸引力。黑石的举措可能带动更多资本流入日本数据中心市场，加速该国AI产业发展。
items.summary_en: Blackstone plans $30 billion investment in Japan AI data centres, Nikkei reports Reuters
items.why_zh: 黑石的大规模投资凸显了AI数据中心市场的巨大潜力，日本有望成为全球AI基础设施的重要节点。
items.why_en: Blackstone's $30B bet highlights the booming AI data center market, positioning Japan as a key global AI infrastructure hub.

items.title_zh: Midjourney转向身体扫描仪：有何不妥？
items.title_en: Something’s off with Midjourney’s pivot to body scanners
items.summary_zh: 以图像生成闻名的AI初创公司Midjourney出人意料地转向医疗成像领域，宣布推出一款未来派超声波扫描仪，用户需浸入水中，声称能产生“与MRI一样强大”的效果，且“像水疗一样随意”。公司CEO David Holz暗示该系统未来可能超越MRI。然而，这一转型引发质疑：从图像生成到医疗设备，跨度巨大，技术可行性和监管挑战不容忽视。
items.summary_en: A scan of an imaging phantom, segmented to validate how cleanly structures separate under controlled conditions. | Image: Midjourney Medical Last week, Midjourney, an AI startup best known for its image generator, made an unusual pivot : medical imaging. The company announced a futuristic ultrasound scanner that would dunk users into a vat of water and, hopefully, produce "something as powerful as MRI" yet "as casual as a trip to the spa." Midjourney says the goal is to help people live longer, better, and healthier lives. CEO David Holz has suggested the system could one day be better than MR…
items.why_zh: Midjourney的激进转型挑战了AI公司的业务边界，其医疗设备的实际效果和安全性有待验证。
items.why_en: Midjourney's bold pivot to medical imaging tests the boundaries of AI startups, with efficacy and safety yet to be proven.
